From: [R]
Subject: Tak for din ansøgning til Thank you for your message

Kære kandidat,

Tak for din ansøgning og dit CV til JobTeam A/S. Vi ser frem til at gennemgå din profil.

Samtykkeerklæring:
Ved at indsende din ansøgning og dit CV giver du os samtykke til at dele dine oplysninger med vores samarbejdspartnere, i JobTeam koncernen, og potentielle arbejdsgivere med det formål at finde en passende stilling til dig. Dine oplysninger vil blive behandlet fortroligt og i overensstemmelse med vores privatlivspolitik.

Hvis du ikke er enig i denne brug af dine oplysninger, eller hvis du ønsker at tilbagekalde dit samtykke, bedes du kontakte os på [R].

Vi takker endnu en gang for din ansøgning og glæder os til at arbejde sammen med dig.

From: [R]
Subject: Application for Employment Opportunities in Europe – Pravat Mandal

Application for Employment Opportunities in Europe – Pravat Mandal

Dear Sir/Madam,

My name is Pravat Mandal, and I am currently based in Bangladesh. I bring
over 8 years of professional experience across Restaurant and Hotel
Management, Food & Beverage operations, Store and Warehouse Management, as
well as Manufacturing environments.

I am writing to express my strong interest in employment opportunities
within Europe. I am particularly interested in roles in the following areas:

• Hotel / Restaurant Management
• Food & Beverage Operations
• Food Packaging and Manufacturing
• Store / Warehouse Management
• Accounts / Finance

Throughout my career, I have developed strong leadership, operational, and
organizational skills, with a focus on maintaining high standards of
quality, efficiency, and customer satisfaction.

I am fully open to relocation across European countries and would require
employer-sponsored work authorization. I am highly motivated to contribute
my experience and skills to an international organization.

Please find my CV attached for your review. I would greatly appreciate the
opportunity to be considered for any suitable positions.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to your response.

Kind regards,
Pravat Mandal
Phone: [R]
Bangladesh

Subject: Application for Europe Hospitality Jobs | Operations Manager

Dear Hiring Team,

I hope you are doing well.

My name is Akshay Kumar, and I am currently working as an Operations
Manager in Mangalore, India, with over 8 years of experience in the
hospitality industry across India, Oman, and Saudi Arabia.

I am writing to express my strong interest in exploring hospitality job
opportunities across Europe through your recruitment network. I am
particularly interested in roles within Hotel Operations, Front Office, or
Guest Relations, where I can contribute my expertise and enhance guest
experience standards.

My core competencies include:
• Managing overall hotel operations with a focus on efficiency and guest
satisfaction
• Leading teams and maintaining high service standards
• Handling guest relations and resolving issues professionally
• Coordinating across departments for seamless daily operations

I am actively seeking international opportunities and would greatly
appreciate your assistance in securing a suitable role, preferably with
visa sponsorship.

Please find my CV attached for your review. I would welcome the opportunity
to discuss potential openings within your network.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to your response.

Warm regards,
Akshay Kumar

Despre ClubAntreprenor
Echipa Club Antreprenor editează revista tipărită Club Antreprenor. În perioada 2020-2024 publicația a
avut o apariție trimestrială - martie, iunie, septembrie si decembrie. Din februarie 2025 am trecut la un
format cu 9 ediții pe an (februarie, martie, aprilie, mai, iunie, septembrie, octombrie, noiembrie și
decembrie).
Fiecare ediție se lansează în cadrul unei Gale. Reprezentanții companiilor care sunt prezente în
revistă au ocazia să se conecteze cu alți antreprenori. Conceptul nostru este unul integrat -
promovare în revista tipărită, pe site-ul clubantreprenor.ro și pe social media + Networking la
Gală.
De asemenea, deținem site-ul clubantreprenor.ro (cu peste 50.000 de cititori unici lunar și domain
rating 53). Site-ul clubantreprenor.ro contribuie la dezvoltarea unei culturi a antreprenoriatului în țara
noastră, cultură bazată pe inovație, viziune, tenacitate, gândire pozitivă, educație financiară, educație
juridică și educație civică. Site-ul clubantreprenor.ro se distinge prin calitatea articolelor, analizelor și
interviurilor publicate. Totodată, pentru a veni în sprijinul antreprenorilor, organizăm conferințe B2B
axate pe diverse domenii: afaceri de familie, construcții, achiziții publice, concurență, deșeuri / mediu,
exporturi, transporturi și infrastructură, energie, fiscalitate, agricultură, medicină și farmacie,
proprietate intelectuală,criminalitate cibernetică,turism, insolvență,etc.
Prima ediție a revistei Club Antreprenor a fost lansată în data de 29 septembrie 2020, în cadrul Galei
Club Antreprenor, ediția I. A doua ediție a fost lansată în data de 9 februarie, în cadrul Galei Club
Antreprenor, ediția a II-a.Atreia ediție a publicației a fost lansată miercuri, 26 mai 2021, la Gala Club
Antreprenor, ediția a III-a. A patra ediție a fost lansată joi, 23 septembrie 2023, la Gala Club
Antreprenor, ediția a IV-a. Ediția cu numărul 5 a revistei a fost lansată joi

Sánchez
Dear Hiring Manager,
We are María Sicre and Roberto Crespo Sánchez, a Spanish couple currently living in Sydney and
planning to relocate in May. We are applying together for hospitality and housekeeping
positions, ideally in hotels that offer on-site accommodation.
We both have solid experience in the hospitality industry and a strong work ethic. María has a
background in hotel housekeeping, premium restaurants, event supervision and Cabin Manager
experience with Iberia Airlines. Roberto has extensive housekeeping experience, restaurant
service experience, and works regularly at events through agency staffing. He is also an
experienced DJ, having performed in iconic venues across Sydney, which can be valuable for
hotels offering entertainment or social events.
We are fast learners, reliable and detail-oriented, and we enjoy working in environments where
teamwork and service quality matter. Over our years in Australia, we have developed
adaptability, resilience and the ability to perform under pressure, both independently and as a
team.
What we value most in a workplace is a positive environment, clear communication and the
opportunity to contribute with dedication and consistency. We are motivated by the idea of
joining a hotel team in Iceland, supporting daily operations, maintaining high standards, and
creating a welcoming experience for guests.
We are fully available to relocate, work flexible shifts, and support the hotel wherever needed.
We are confident that our combined experience, professionalism and teamwork make us a
strong addition to your team.
Thank you very much for considering our application. We would be happy to provide further
information or schedule an online interview at your convenience.
Warm regards,
María Sicre
